en: Welcome back to Mirror Interpretation Todorova's idioms and slang. The idiom of
the day is face the music. It means accept consequences, accept unpleasant
consequences or a responsibility for something, accept punishment, criticism
for something wrong or for not very good decisions. Face the music. It means
accept the consequences of your actions. Thank you guys for being here. If you
enjoy these shorts please press like and write me a comment below what kind of
shorts would you enjoy to see. I hope you have a great day. Bye bye.
